description: Lijian 11 Stealth Attack Drone (GJ11) is the FIRST aerospace memorial coin on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time. According to CCTV, GJ-11 is the world’s FIRST stealth attack drone that entered military service in China in November 2025. ATC-20 GJ11 honors the most advanced stealth engineering, unmanned precision, human-machine network verification, and next-generation aviation within Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Lijian 11 Stealth Attack Drone
